name: OpenCode Go | Low cost coding models for everyone
snippet:
OpenCode Go is a low cost subscription: $ 5 for your first month, then $10/month . It provides generous limits and reliable access to the most capable open source ...
Go brings agentic coding to programmers around the world. Offering generous limits and reliable access to the most capable open-source models, so you can build with powerful agents without worrying about cost or availability.

name: opencode: Reviews, Features, Pricing, Guides, and Alternatives
snippet: Discover the features, user reviews, and alternatives to opencode. OpenCode is a powerful, open-source AI coding agent built specifically for the terminal that provides intelligent coding assistance through a native Terminal User Interface (TUI) with support for multiple LLM providers.
